steps.title: Spot the contradiction
steps.content: The passage establishes that writers with successful debuts may struggle with follow-ups. Yet Tommy Orange's case shows the opposite: “the follow-up actually elevates the writer's reputation.” The transition must signal this is an exception, not a typical case.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content: Sometimes signals that while writers often struggle with follow-ups, Tommy Orange is an exception—his follow-up elevated his reputation. The other choices (Specifically, Accordingly, For example) all frame his case as confirming the initial claim about struggle, contradicting what the passage shows. That matches choice C — C is correct.
